zh.lifeSummary: Phebe於大約1610年出生在英國越可爾。她於1638年與Richard Sikes在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1687年1月2日在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普登斯普林菲爾德享年78歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普登斯普林菲爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Phebe于大约1610年出生在英国越可爾。她于1638年与Richard Sikes在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1687年1月2日在美国马萨诸塞州哈普登斯普林菲爾德享年78岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州哈普登斯普林菲爾德。

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Phebe was born about 1610, in Yorkshire, England. She married Richard Sikes in 1638, in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 2 January 1687, in Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 78, and was buried in Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Phebe est née environ 1610, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Richard Sikes en 1638, à Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 janvier 1687, à Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. it.lifeSummary: Phebe è nata il circa 1610 nel Yorkshire, England. Lei sposato Richard Sikes nel 1638, nel Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 2 gennaio 1687, nel Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolta a Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Phebeは約1610年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた。1638年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクドールチェスターでRichard Sikesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1687年1月2日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプデンスプリングフィールドで78歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプデンスプリングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Phebe(은)는 대략 1610년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1638년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 도르체스터에서 Richard Sikes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1687년 1월 2일 미국 매사추세츠 주 함p든 스프링필드에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 함p든 스프링필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Phebe nasceu aproximadamente 1610, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Richard Sikes em 1638, em Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de janeiro de 1687, em Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 78 anos, e foi sepultada em Springfield, Hampden, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Phebe родилась около 1610 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Sikes в 1638 г. в местности дорчестир, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 2 января 1687 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампден, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности спрингфиелд, хампден, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Phebe nació aproximadamente 1610, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Richard Sikes en 1638, en Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 2 de enero de 1687, en Springfield, Hampden, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultada en Springfield, Hampden, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.

th.Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: สปริงฟิลด์, ฮัมปชิเร, แมสซาชอูสเอตส แบย โกโลนี, บริตอิช โกโลนิาล อาเมริแค
